features.title: Our Expertise
features.desc: Delivering high-quality industrial components, from Air Compressors to specialized Filtration Systems.

about_section.title: About Us
about_section.desc: Hermes-Zenith is a leading provider of premium industrial solutions for process rotating equipment. We specialize in lubrication systems, filtration technologies, and contamination control products that increase plant reliability, extend equipment lifespan, and reduce maintenance costs.
about_section.mission: To deliver cutting-edge industrial solutions that maximize equipment uptime, optimize maintenance efficiency, and drive operational excellence for our valued clients.
about_section.vision: To be the most trusted partner in industrial process equipment solutions across Southeast Asia.

products_section.title: Our Products
products_section.desc: We offer a comprehensive range of industrial products designed to protect, maintain, and enhance the performance of your critical equipment.
products_section.breather_desc: Protect your equipment from moisture, dust and contaminants with advanced breather technology filtering particles down to 3 microns.
products_section.grease_desc: MQL (Minimum Quantity Lubrication) systems with RFID tracking for precise, automated bearing lubrication at the right volume and interval.
products_section.container_desc: Color-coded smart storage and transfer solutions that eliminate cross-contamination and wrong oil type application.
products_section.filter_desc: Complete range of oil filters, air filters, bag filters, water filters, and oil separators for all industrial applications.

contact_section.title: Contact Us
contact_section.desc: Ready to optimize your industrial equipment performance? Get in touch with our team of experts.
contact_section.address: 389/157 Moo.6, Phrakesa Subdistrict, Mueang Samut Prakan District, Samut Prakan 10280 TH

about.title: About Hermes-Zenith
about.content: Hermes-Zenith provides state-of-the-art industrial products, focusing on process rotating equipment. We aim to increase productivity, reduce maintenance costs, and extend equipment lifespans.
about.hero_desc: Hermes-Zenith is dedicated to delivering high-performance industrial solutions that ensure operational reliability and efficiency for our partners worldwide.
about.story_content: Founded with a vision to revolutionize industrial maintenance, Hermes-Zenith has grown into a trusted leader in process rotating equipment. We combine technical expertise with innovative products to solve complex industrial challenges.

products.title: Our Products
products.hero_subtitle: Explore our comprehensive range of high-performance rotating equipment and spare parts.

services.title: Industrial Services
services.hero_subtitle: Expert maintenance, repair, and optimization for your critical industrial infrastructure.

repair.title: Repair & Parts Replacement
repair.desc: Our factory-trained technicians provide comprehensive repair services and genuine spare parts replacement to ensure your equipment returns to peak performance.

cleaning.title: Cleaning & Commissioning
cleaning.desc: Thorough maintenance protocols including deep cleaning, safety checks, and professional starting procedures to guarantee smooth operational transitions.

process.title: Our Service Process
process.step1_desc: Comprehensive inspection and root cause analysis of equipment issues.
process.step2_desc: Proposing the most efficient repair or maintenance strategy for your needs.
process.step3_desc: Professional implementation by our certified technical team.
process.step4_desc: Ongoing monitoring and maintenance advice to prevent future issues.
